settings.heading: Fresh Food in 3 Simple Steps

settings.heading: Add Seeds & Water
settings.text: Place your seeds in the growing tray, add clean water, and set in indirect light. Takes 2 minutes.

settings.heading: Watch Them Grow
settings.text: Water daily and watch your microgreens sprout and grow. Our systems keep the perfect moisture level automatically.

settings.heading: Harvest & Enjoy
settings.text: In 7 days, cut your fresh microgreens and enjoy the most nutrient-dense food possible, right from your room.

settings.heading: Everything You Need to Know
settings.subheading: New to microgreens? We've got you covered with the most common questions
settings.contact_text: Still have questions? We're here to help!

settings.question: How long does it really take to grow microgreens?
settings.answer: 7-14 days from seed to harvest. Most varieties are ready in exactly 7 days. Pea shoots and sunflower might take up to 10 days. You'll see sprouts within 24-48 hours!

settings.question: What's the difference between the growing systems?
settings.answer:
Sprout Starter ($11): Basic tray, perfect for beginners
7-Day System ($15): Stackable trays, grow multiple varieties
Smart Grow Pro ($113): Fully automated with lights and app control

settings.question: Do I need any gardening experience?
settings.answer: Absolutely not! Our systems are designed for complete beginners. If you can make coffee, you can grow microgreens. Each system comes with step-by-step instructions and seed varieties that are nearly impossible to mess up.

settings.question: How much space do I need?
settings.answer: Countertop space is perfect. All systems fit on a standard kitchen counter. The Sprout Starter needs about 8x6 inches, the 7-Day System stacks vertically to save space, and the Smart Grow Pro is about 12x8 inches.

settings.question: What can I grow and how much will I get?
settings.answer: Tons of varieties! Radish, broccoli, pea shoots, sunflower, arugula, kale, and more. Each tray produces enough microgreens for 4-6 servings. The 7-Day System can produce a week's worth of fresh greens!
